entities.name: V
entities.context: The individual whose knowledge system is being described.

entities.name: canonical location
entities.context: The designated location for storing processed meetings.

entities.name: meetings
entities.context: Events that are processed and stored.

entities.name: staging area
entities.context: Temporary space for meetings before they are moved to the canonical location.

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: A separate concern that must not be conflated with meetings.

relationships.context: V understands the importance of using a canonical location for storing meetings.
V manages the organization and storage of meetings.
V refers to the staging area as a temporary holding place for meetings.
V believes that Careerspan and meetings are separate concerns.
